summary: Add sync-rates command that pulls /latest for a base currency and appends every (base, target, rate) row to rates_snapshots.
reason: Foundation for every snapshot-driven feature (history-cache, drift, pair --as-of, watch). The generator's generic sync emits to typed tables only for spec resources; rates_snapshots is a hand-authored table.
validated_outcome: sync-rates --base USD writes ~166 snapshots in a single call; rows appear in rates_snapshots with captured_at timestamps; subsequent history-cache USD EUR returns the synced rates.
